title: Harder Wardens
description: Wardens have much more health and deal more damage but they also give good rewards for defeating them!
body:
![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab445b70d606b96245d2dcb0fe9756d1f09c69.webp)
### [Use our code " withrage " to get 25% discount!](https://bisecthosting.com/withrage)
# HARDER WARDENS

**Wardens** have much **more health** and deal **more damage** but they also give **better rewards** for defeating them!

Wardens have **500 HP** _(250hearts)_, deal **1.5x more damage** and drop custom loot by default.

There are 6 difficulty settings that you can change in the **config file** - Easy, Normal, Hard, Nightmare, Insane and Custom.

This plugin is also available on **[Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/harder-wardens.121160/)** and **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/harder-wardens)**!
![Harder Wardens description image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfff22da455ba77ecd5e25ad5856ba8b6406bb3f_0.webp)
